title: wYw Rose Gold Foil Balloons Mr Mrs - Weddings - Decorations
features: Fill the balloon with air and then hang it from the ceiling or attach it to the wall with double-sided tape.
You can attach the balloon to the holders. You can tie the balloon with string (not included).
The set contains a foil balloon Mr - size approx. 62.5 x 31.5 cm, a foil balloon Mrs - size approx. 69 x 32.5 cm and a foil balloon heart. Diameter approx. 25 cm.

PartyDeco is a European brand that has been launching beautiful decorations for different occasions since 1995. Wedding, birthday or maybe a bachelor party? With PartyDeco you can decorate a room for any event. The decorations meet the latest trends and customer expectations.
description: Mrs & Mr foil balloon in rose gold, dimensions approx. 62.5 x 31.5 cm, foil balloon Mrs - size approx. 69 x 32.5 cm and foil balloon heart - diameter approx. 25cm Foil balloons are an indispensable part of any party decoration. That's why the Mrs&Mr rose gold foil balloon from PartyDeco is a must have on your shopping list. Its shiny surface allows you to create an impressive and interesting composition that will be remembered by all participants of the party. The balloon is an ideal room decoration - great for decorating the room above the table. Balloons are versatile. You can use them alone or in a composition with other decorations. The latex balloon is made of high-quality material.
